subject: A young warrior with short blue-tinted hair wearing a dark jacket and red scarf, moving forward with arms raised in a defensive or charging posture, green energy streaking around them.
suspected_ip: Future Trunks (base form) — Dragon Ball franchise
description: A young male-presenting warrior fills roughly three-quarters of the frame in a dynamic forward-motion pose. The figure has short hair with a blue-gray tint, wearing a dark jacket (dark blue or black) with a bright red scarf. Arms are raised and extended forward, suggesting a charge or defensive block. Green energy and streaking motion lines radiate behind the figure creating a sense of rapid movement. The background is dark with green energy trails. Expression appears intense and determined.
foreground: Young warrior in dark jacket and red scarf, arms raised, charging forward
background: Dark background with green energy streaks and motion lines
emotion: Determined urgency — rushing forward to protect or confront
